message:
🌱 Add operator-framework: operator-sdk supports Go version 1.16 mission (#1621)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "operator-framework-4828-operator-sdk-supports-go-version-1-16",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "operator-framework: operator-sdk supports Go version 1.16",
+    "description": "operator-sdk supports Go version 1.16. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current operator-framework deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your operator-framework version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework\nhelm list -n operator-framework 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working operator-framework installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review operator-framework configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant operator-framework configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework\nkubectl get configmap -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=operator-framework\n```\n#### What did you do?\n\nbrew install operator-sdk && operator-sdk init --domain example.com --repo github.com/example/memcached-operator\n\n#### What did you expect to see?\n\na working operator-sdk\n\n#### What did you see instead? Under which"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for operator-sdk supports Go version 1.16",
+        "description": "Updating operator-SDK from go1.15 to go 1.16 \r\n\nIf the pull request includes user-facing changes, extra documentation is required:\n```yaml\nbrew install --ignore-dependencies operator-sdk                                                                                                                                                                                \n\nWarning: `--ignore-dependencies` is an unsupported Homebrew developer flag!\nAdjust your PATH to put any preferred versions of applications earlier in the\nPATH rather than using this unsupported flag!\n\n==> Downloading https://ghcr.io/v2/homebrew/core/operator-sdk/manifests/1.10.0\nAlready downloaded: /Users/.../Library/Caches/Homebrew/downloads/28ad2654d248250e88fb54273f7c14\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n operator-framework -l app.kubernetes.io/name=operator-framework\nkubectl get events -n operator-framework --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"operator-sdk supports Go version 1.16\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Updating operator-SDK from go1.15 to go 1.16 \r\n\nIf the pull request includes user-facing changes, extra documentation is required:",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "brew install --ignore-dependencies operator-sdk                                                                                                                                                                                \n\nWarning: `--ignore-dependencies` is an unsupported Homebrew developer flag!\nAdjust your PATH to put any preferred versions of applications earlier in the\nPATH rather than using this unsupported flag!\n\n==> Downloading https://ghcr.io/v2/homebrew/core/operator-sdk/manifests/1.10.0\nAlready downloaded: /Users/.../Library/Caches/Homebrew/downloads/28ad2654d248250e88fb54273f7c14baceda77293187533b7e3e613fa19e7dc3--operator-sdk-1.10.0.bottle_manifest.json\n==> Downloading https://ghcr.io/v2/homebrew/core/operator-sdk/blobs/sha256:da84773b99a524fa3075b852fdac4636e287c737d59dd795",
+        "operator-sdk version                                                                                                                                                                                                          \noperator-sdk version: \"v1.10.0\", commit: \"c247d4b4142cd7736f122796e3388fbd05f62b71\", kubernetes version: \"v1.20.2\", go version: \"go1.16.6\", GOOS: \"darwin\", GOARCH: \"amd64\"",
+        "operator-sdk init --domain ids.sap.com --repo example.com/handler-operator\nWriting kustomize manifests for you to edit...\nWriting scaffold for you to edit...\nGet controller runtime:\n$ go get sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime@v0.9.2\ngo: downloading sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime v0.9.2\ngo: downloading k8s.io/apimachinery v0.21.2\ngo: downloading k8s.io/client-go v0.21.2\ngo: downloading k8s.io/utils v0.0.0-20210527160623-6fdb442a123b\ngo: downloading github.com/prometheus/client_golang v1.11.0\ngo: downloading github.com/go-logr/logr v0.4.0\ngo: downloading k8s.io/api v0.21.2\ngo: downloading github.com/gogo/protobuf v1.3.2\ngo: downloading golang.org/x/sys v0.0.0-20210603081109-ebe580a85c40\ngo: downloading golang.org/x/net v0.0.0-20210428140749-89ef3d95e781\ngo: downloading k8s.io/component-base v0.2"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
